description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a conventional tail. The fuselage is slender and streamlined, painted primarily in light gray with a red nose cone and a red accent line running along the top of the fuselage. The propeller is mounted at the front, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a smaller tail wheel, indicating a taildragger setup. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, likely accommodating one or two seats. The wings are straight with slight dihedral and lack winglets, while the tail features a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers in a classic arrangement.
description: A small, high-wing, single-propeller airplane with a red nose, gray body, and taildragger landing gear. The cockpit is forward and enclosed, with a conventional tail and straight wings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-wing placement, red nose, and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, forward cockpit, and straight wings with slight dihedral.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the tail, wing, and landing gear details.
description_view_3: Head-on view emphasizing the propeller, landing gear stance, and wing span.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral, no winglets or variable geometry.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit likely configured for one or two seats, with a clear canopy.
